title: JioMart Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: JioMart Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at JioMart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About JioMart Capital India:
JioMart Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart Capital India!
